name: Darkbloom
description: Decentralized inference on idle Apple Silicon Macs. OpenAI-compatible API, end-to-end encrypted, hardware-attested privacy — up to 70% cheaper than centralized cloud inference.

skills.name: OpenAI-Compatible API
skills.description: Drop in Darkbloom as your base URL — works with any OpenAI SDK client without code changes

skills.name: E2E Encryption
skills.description: Route inference through end-to-end encrypted channels so no node sees plaintext prompts or responses

skills.name: Hardware Attestation
skills.description: Verify inference runs on real Apple Silicon with hardware-level attestation before sending data
